property.content:
{{velocity}} #set ($discard = $xwiki.jsx.use('OpenProject.Code.CreateWorkPackagesExtensionPoint')) #macro (connectionInput $selectConnectionId $connectionOptions)
#if ($connectionOptions.size() == 0)

No OpenProject connections available! Please create a connection first.

#else #end
#end #macro (incorrectToken $incorrectTokenId)
#set($redirect = $escapetool.url($doc.getURL('view'))) #set($token = $escapetool.url($services.csrf.getToken())) #set($params = "redirectUrl=$redirect&token=$token")

This connection is not available! Follow this link to authenticate and try again!

#end #macro (projectInput $projectSelectId $connectionOptions)
#end {{html}}
  • Create work package
  • Create work package from table

This form allows you to create a new work package in OpenProject based on the selected text.

#set ($connectionOptions = $services.openproject.getConnectionOptions()) #connectionInput('connection-select-single-work-package' $connectionOptions) #incorrectToken('incorrect-token-single-work-package') #projectInput('project-select-single-work-package' $connectionOptions)

This form allows you to create multiple work packages in OpenProject based on the selected table.

#connectionInput('connection-select-multiple-work-packages') #incorrectToken('incorrect-token-multiple-work-packages') #projectInput('project-select-multiple-work-packages')

OpenProject Mapping

Map the columns of your table to OpenProject fields. Each mapping will map the values of a column to the OpenProject field of you choice.

+ Add mapping

The following work packages will be created

{{/html}} {{/velocity}}
